-  init(headroom:width:height:bitsPerComponent:bitsPerPixel:bytesPerRow:space:bitmapInfo:provider:decode:shouldInterpolate:intent:) 

Initializer# init(headroom:width:height:bitsPerComponent:bitsPerPixel:bytesPerRow:space:bitmapInfo:provider:decode:shouldInterpolate:intent:)

iOS 18.0+iPadOS 18.0+Mac Catalyst 18.0+macOS 15.0+tvOS 18.0+visionOS 2.0+watchOS 11.0+

```
init?(
    headroom: Float,
    width: Int,
    height: Int,
    bitsPerComponent: Int,
    bitsPerPixel: Int,
    bytesPerRow: Int,
    space: CGColorSpace,
    bitmapInfo: CGBitmapInfo,
    provider: CGDataProvider,
    decode: UnsafePointer<CGFloat>?,
    shouldInterpolate: Bool,
    intent: CGColorRenderingIntent
)
```
